---
name: Feature request / 功能请求
about: Suggest an idea for Vox Dynastica / 为 Vox Dynastica 提出新功能
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

<!--
Either English or 中文 is fine. 两种语言均可。
-->

## Problem / 问题
<!--
What do you wish were possible? Phrase it as a player / modder / contributor frustration, not a solution.
你希望能做到什么？请描述使用者（玩家 / 模组作者 / 贡献者）的痛点，而非具体方案。
-->

## Proposed direction / 建议方向
<!-- Optional. Sketch a possible approach. / 可选。粗略勾勒一种实现方向。 -->

## Which phase does this belong to? / 该功能应归属哪个阶段？
<!--
See docs/ROADMAP.md. If this is out of scope for Phases 0–3, say so.
参见 docs/ROADMAP.zh-CN.md。如不属于 Phase 0–3 任何一个，请说明。
-->
- [ ] Phase 0 — Pipeline / MVP 管线
- [ ] Phase 1 — In-game UI / 游戏内 UI
- [ ] Phase 2 — Enemy + church voices / 敌国与教会视角
- [ ] Phase 3 — Drift + carriers + gameplay hooks / 漂移、载体、反向钩子
- [ ] Out of scope but worth tracking / 当前路线图之外，但值得记录

## Additional context / 其他信息
